temporal_description: A man with dark hair, wearing a dark suit jacket over a patterned shirt, sits at a desk in a dimly lit room. He is smoking, with a cigarette in his mouth and smoke billowing around him. He looks down at the desk, his expression serious. The background is dark and indistinct, with a single light source illuminating him from the side. To his right, another person in a dark suit is partially visible, standing near a tall, dark object that resembles a briefcase. In the top left corner of the screen, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in a light color. The camera remains stationary, holding a medium shot of the man at the desk. The audio begins with the soft, continuous sound of a cigarette burning and the faint rustle of clothing, creating a quiet and tense atmosphere. The camera cuts to a close-up of a different man. He is wearing glasses, a dark suit, a white collared shirt, and a patterned tie. He looks slightly to his left with a concerned or intense expression, his mouth slightly open as if he is speaking. The background is a solid, dark blue, and the lighting is focused on him, casting the rest of the frame in shadow. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The shot is static. A man then speaks in a calm, conversational tone, as if remembering something. "Ah, right," he says, his voice steady and clear. He continues, "Before the lawyer arrived..." his sentence trailing off, leaving the thought unfinished. The background remains quiet, with no other prominent sounds or music.
